home_hero_subtitle: 3% fuel discount exclusively for TALPA members
home_hero_desc: Members of the Turkish Airline Pilots Association can enjoy a 3% fuel discount at all OPET and Sunpet stations through the OPET Otobil Mobil application.
home_feature1_desc: Valid fuel discount at all OPET and Sunpet stations
home_feature2_desc: Quick membership activation with a single WhatsApp message
home_feature3_desc: Discount automatically applied from your first fuel purchase
query_validation: National ID must be 11 digits and contain only numbers.
query_not_found: Your membership was not found in the system. Please contact TALPA.
query_borclu: You have outstanding dues. Please settle your dues to access your code and try again.
guide_subtitle: Follow the steps below to activate your OPET Otobil Mobil membership.
guide_step1_desc: Download the Otobil Mobil app for free from the App Store or Google Play.
guide_step2_desc: Query and copy your personal campaign code with your National ID number.
guide_step3_desc: Send the following message to 444 67 38 via WhatsApp:
guide_step3_note: To get your code, first visit the
guide_step4_desc: Approve the membership agreement sent to you within the Otobil Mobil application.
guide_step5_desc: Starting from your first fuel purchase, the 3% discount will be automatically applied.
faq_a1: The discount is valid at all OPET and Sunpet stations. You can use it at over 2,000 stations across Turkey.
faq_q2: When does the discount become active?
faq_a2: After confirming the membership agreement following your WhatsApp application, the discount is automatically applied from your first fuel purchase.
faq_q3: What should I do if my code doesn't work?
faq_a3: First make sure you entered the code correctly. If the issue persists, contact TALPA or call OPET Customer Service at 444 67 38.
faq_q4: How do I pay my outstanding dues?
faq_a4: To pay your dues, visit TALPA's official website or contact the association directly.
faq_q5: What if I'm already an Otobil Mobil member?
faq_a5: You can update your existing Otobil Mobil membership with the TALPA discount. Simply send the WhatsApp application message and your account will be automatically updated.
query_whatsapp_info: After copying your code, you can activate your membership by sending it to OPET via WhatsApp.
query_suspended: Applications are currently suspended. Please try again later or contact TALPA.
query_quota_full: Current quota has been reached. Please contact TALPA.
